title: The Weather in Praia do Sol
description: Weather vocabulary + the four seasons. Rains, storms, humid, windy. Plus IT'S construction for weather.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário de clima e estações. Regra-chave: em inglês usa-se IT + BE para clima ('It's raining' / 'It's hot'), nunca 'the weather is raining'.

scenes.subtitle_en: It's hot. It's raining. It's beautiful.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Tá calor. Tá chovendo. Tá lindo.

scenes.text_en:
In Praia do Sol the weather changes fast.
IN SUMMER it's HOT and HUMID. We SWEAT.
IN AUTUMN it's WINDY and COOL. The waves get big.
IN WINTER it RAINS almost every day. Cosmo HATES the rain.
IN SPRING it's SUNNY but mild. Perfect for surfing.
scenes.text_pt:
Em Praia do Sol o clima muda rápido.
NO VERÃO faz CALOR e é ÚMIDO. A gente SUA.
NO OUTONO é VENTOSO e FRESCO. As ondas crescem.
NO INVERNO CHOVE quase todo dia. O Cosmo ODEIA chuva.
NA PRIMAVERA é ENSOLARADO mas ameno. Perfeito pra surf.

scenes.title: Weather uses IT + BE
scenes.body_en: English says 'IT IS raining' / 'IT WAS cold'. Never 'the weather is raining' or 'the day is hot'. The subject 'it' has no translation — it's there because English needs a subject. Same for time: 'It's 3 o'clock.'
scenes.body_pt: Em inglês, clima usa 'IT + be': It's raining, It's hot. 'It' não tem tradução — só existe porque o inglês exige um sujeito. Igual para horas: 'It's 3 o'clock'.

examples.en: It's raining. It's cold. It was sunny yesterday.
examples.pt: Está chovendo. Tá frio. Estava ensolarado ontem.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: IT + BE for weather. 'It is hot'.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Yesterday ___ ___ (rain) all day.'
exercise.explanation: Past continuous with IT for ongoing weather.
